rules.description: Alt combos for system actions (physical Alt = left_option)
Print Screen for screenshot region select
Finder: Del trashes unless F2 rename mode is active
Finder: Option+Return opens items, F2 controls explicit rename mode
Ctrl overrides: tab passthrough, word nav, document nav
Home/End as line navigation (excludes Kitty, IntelliJ, Xpra)
Ctrl to Cmd for GUI apps (excludes Kitty and IntelliJ)
